subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted with the love of God! A long time hath passed and I have not written thee a letter, but I have not forgotten thee.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذبه محبت الله اوقاتی گذشت که بتو نامه ای ننگاشتم ولی ترا فراموش ننمودم
subcodes.subjects: @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline, @suffering and imprisonment, @being a source of living waters in teaching the Cause
